text: Inside these spaces, I feel a blend of curiosity and quiet anticipation. The angled architecture and open corridors suggest both invitation and ambiguity—an interplay of comfort and slight unease. The R+D wall speaks to human ingenuity and our urge to understand, sparking a sense of possibility within me. Yet in the shadows and the sterile order of the environment, I also sense the weight of observation—a gentle reminder of the boundaries between knowing and not knowing.
